display_name: OpenAI’s o1-pro highly capable reasoning model, tailored for complex, compute- or context-heavy tasks, dedicating additional thinking time to deliver more accurate, reliable answers. For less costly,
description:
OpenAI’s o1-pro highly capable reasoning model, tailored for complex, compute- or context-heavy tasks, dedicating additional thinking time to deliver more accurate, reliable answers. For less costly, complex tasks, https://poe.com/o3-mini is recommended.

Optional parameters:
Set reasoning effort: Select from low, medium, high. Medium reasoning effort is set by default.
